case_title: GLEN A. SUMMERS VS. MONEYGRAM PAYMENT SYSTEMS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$25.00) SERVED FEB-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONEYGRAM PAYMENT SYSTEMS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUMMERS, GLEN A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONEYGRAM PAYMENT SYSTEMS, INC. UNDER THE EVIDENCE PRESNTED, DEFENDANT FULFILLED ITS OBLIGATION TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT THE PURCHASER OF THE MONEY ORDER ISSUED TO THE RECIPIENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY SUMMERS, GLEN A. AS TO DEFENDANT MONEYGRAM PAYMENT SYSTEMS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MONEYGRAM PAYMENT SYSTEMS, INC.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SUMMERS, GLEN A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
